			"
		}
		epbm_register_pm = {
			pm = terraces_maintenance
			goods_block = "
				epbm_good = { good = salt amount = 0.1 }
			"
		}

	}

	# Estate-assigned buildings: charge full cost to the named estate
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:artisan_guilds value = estate_type:burghers_estate }
	add_to_global_variable_map = { name = epbm_estate_map key = building_type:bulgarian_administration_center value = estate_type:peasants_estate }
